description: An asset strategist needs to decide which aging substation transformers to replace next year based on health and criticality.

nodes.task_description: Gather data on all transformers older than 30 years, including their health index (from DGA, etc.) and load history.

expected_outcome.expected: System compiles a list of aging transformers with their condition data.

nodes.task_description: Determine the criticality of each transformer based on the number of customers and type of load (e.g., hospitals, industrial) it serves.

expected_outcome.expected: System assigns a criticality score to each transformer.

nodes.task_description: Create a prioritized replacement list based on a combined risk score of poor health and high criticality.

expected_outcome.expected: System generates a ranked list of transformers recommended for replacement.
